title: Skull Soldier
original_title: 髑髏戦士 ザ・スカルソルジャー 復讐の美学
overview: Narumi, a man out for revenge with the powers he received and a bit of help from the one who saved his life, he creates the persona of Skull Soldier and attempts to discover who really killed his sister.
